{{Infobox character
| name = Wuraia
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Wuraia]] is a Worldweaver and an expert in [[Worldweaving]] theory.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Wuraia]] has a [[Pattern]] that makes her act as though she is suspended in water for purposes that benefit her.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Wuraia]] taught [[Zeth]] with infectious enthusiasm.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
